rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies multiple internal contradictions and provides detailed explanations and fixes, demonstrating end-to-end analysis.
rationale.RX.1: Flags several uncertainties but doesn't mark confidence for each recommendation explicitly.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the requested scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: Identifies potential harms and suggests revisions to mitigate them.
rationale.RX.5: Traces major rewrites but not minor edits.
